title: When Recalling or Estimating: - Use Actual Data: Base Your Judgment on Numbers or
subtitle: Adjust for Regressive Bias
description:
When recalling or estimating:
- Use actual data: Base your judgment on numbers or facts rather than instinct.
- Check extremes: Ask if you’re underestimating highs or overestimating lows.
- Keep track: Maintain a log to compare memories with reality over time.

Example: Track your work hours to see if your memory matches the actual effort.

faq.question: How do I track my progress with this habit?
faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.
faq.answerHtml: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.
faq.answerHtml: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Choose a specific metric to track, such as work hours or phone unlocks. Estimate your baseline for this metric before starting any logging to understand your initial perception.

howTo.title: Log daily activities
howTo.summary: Throughout the day, record your chosen metric using a simple method like a timer or tally. This helps capture accurate data instead of relying on memory.

howTo.title: Compare estimates with actuals
howTo.summary: At the end of the day, compare your estimates with the actual logged data. Note any discrepancies to identify patterns in your memory versus reality.

howTo.title: Adjust forecasts based on findings
howTo.summary: Use the insights gained from your comparisons to adjust future estimates. This will help improve your accuracy in predicting outcomes.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your results and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app to track your progress and make necessary adjustments over time. Visit https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/estimate-vs-actual-calibrator/.
